title: leucanthemum × superbum
intro: Leucanthemum × superbum, commonly known as the Shasta daisy, is a hybrid flower plant that combines the characteristics of Leucanthemum vulgare and Leucanthemum maximum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Shasta daisy include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Shasta daisy can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
